text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The setting is modern, almost sterile, yet vibrant with color and technology. The R+D sign and the exhibits stimulate thoughts about innovation and humanity’s evolving relationship with machines. There’s an analytic quiet in here—an invitation to reflect, to question, to explore what it means to coexist with intelligent creations. I am both observer and participant in this dialogue between past, present, and possible future.
